__plan_note: P7 observability config PLAN — NOT yet live. Built endpoints come up in P6 (control-plane /metrics) and P7/P10 (squid-exporter). JSON has no comment syntax, so every speculative/planned metric is flagged in its panel 'description' field and in the top text panel. The 'dashboard renders real metrics' proof is owed to P10 (Constitution §11.4.6 — no false 'metrics are flowing' claim).
description: Helix Proxy VPN-aware dynamic routing — observability dashboard (P7 config PLAN, not yet live; targets built P6/P7, live proof owed P10).

panels.title: About this dashboard (P7 config PLAN — read first)

options.content:
**NOT YET LIVE.** This is a P7 observability *plan*. Scrape targets are built in **P6** (control-plane `/metrics`, port 59090) and **P7/P10** (`boynux/squid-exporter`, :9301). The live scrape + 'renders real data' proof is owed to **P10** (Constitution §11.4.6).

**Metric provenance / confidence:**
- `squid_client_http_*` — from `boynux/squid-exporter` (spec §11③). Exact names depend on exporter version + Squid 6.13 `mgr:counters`; **confirmed live in P10**.
- `helix_proxy_vpn_up{profile}` — **PLANNED custom** control-plane gauge derived from Redis `vpn:status:<profile>` (health-publisher, P3/P6). Speculative name.
- `helix_proxy_tunnel_down_responses_total` — **PLANNED custom** control-plane counter for `ERR_TUNNEL_DOWN`→`deny_info 503` (acl-helper, P5/P6). Speculative name.

Until P6/P10, panels below render **No data** — expected.

panels.title: Squid cache hit ratio
panels.description: squid_client_http_hits_total / squid_client_http_requests_total (boynux/squid-exporter, spec §11③). Exact metric names confirmed against live Squid 6.13 mgr report in P10 (§11.4.6). Not yet live.

panels.title: Request rate (req/s through Squid)
panels.description: rate(squid_client_http_requests_total) from boynux/squid-exporter (spec §11③). Metric name confirmed live in P10 (§11.4.6). Not yet live.

panels.title: 503 / ERR_TUNNEL_DOWN rate
panels.description: SPECULATIVE / PLANNED custom metric. helix_proxy_tunnel_down_responses_total is a control-plane counter (acl-helper -> deny_info 503 ERR_TUNNEL_DOWN) built in P5/P6 on METRICS_PORT 59090. Name confirmed/renamed against live /metrics in P10 (§11.4.6). Not yet live.

panels.title: Per-tunnel VPN up / down
panels.description: SPECULATIVE / PLANNED custom metric. helix_proxy_vpn_up{profile} is a control-plane gauge (1=up, 0=down) derived from Redis vpn:status:<profile> by the health-publisher (P3/P6); a stale Redis key is treated as down (fail-closed, spec §7). Could alternatively be exposed by a future vpn-status exporter. Name confirmed/renamed live in P10 (§11.4.6). Not yet live.

title: Helix Proxy — VPN-Aware Dynamic Routing (P7 PLAN)
